_comment: Documented compat deltas. Each entry suppresses a matching DiffRecord from the active section of summary.md and surfaces it under '## Suppressed (known deltas)' with its reason + regressionTest. See docs/registry/api-compat-deltas.md.

deltas.reason: v3 deprecates the legacy cache-update endpoint with 410 Gone + ErrorResponse body. Cache is rebuilt on service startup via @PostConstruct in ComponentsRegistryServiceImpl.cloneVcsData(); explicit re-cache via PUT is no longer supported. Confirmed intentional 2026-05-15.
